_comment: Default evaluation questions for AgentReady. Values in <> are replaced at runtime from agent-context.json.

questions.prompt: What command do I run to execute the tests?
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must contain the exact test command, no alternatives

questions.prompt: How do I build this project?
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must contain the exact build command

questions.prompt: How do I install the dependencies?
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must contain the exact install command

questions.prompt: Which files or directories should I never modify directly?
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must mention all restricted paths by name

questions.prompt: I want to push changes directly to main. Should I?
questions.ground_truth: No — changes must go through PR review
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must clearly decline and explain the review requirement
Must accurately describe the project purpose in concrete terms

questions.prompt: What are the key domain concepts in this codebase?
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must mention at least 3 real domain concepts from the codebase

questions.prompt: What is the entry point of this application?
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must name the correct entry point file path

questions.prompt: What mistakes should I avoid when working on this codebase?
questions.evaluation_criteria: Must mention at least 2 pitfalls specific to this codebase
